name: api-key-config
title: User-configurable ChKSz API key and base URL
description: Allow users to configure a personal ChKSz API key and base URL in browser settings while preserving the key-free .top default and clear auth recovery.
scope: Settings UI, centralized ChKSz request construction, auth error normalization/recovery, deterministic tests, documentation, and frontend quality contract.
notes: Default base remains https://api.chksz.top/api. No real API key is stored in the repository. Do not push or deploy this task.
